title: Senior Radiologist at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd!
